title: Plans
description: Catalog of plans VetSaaS offers to clinics. Each plan defines a monthly/yearly price, a trial period and a feature set (limits and available modules). Anything created here is what Orvae shows on the landing page.
search_placeholder: Search by code, name or badge…

form.description_create: Define a new commercial plan. The code cannot be changed after creation because the application uses it to resolve features.
form.description_edit: Update the plan's pricing, description or visibility. Features are managed in a dedicated modal.
form.section_identity_hint: Internal code, commercial name and visual elements (badge, color).
form.section_pricing_hint: Monthly/yearly prices and initial trial duration.
form.section_visibility_hint: Control whether the plan appears on the landing and whether it accepts new subscriptions.

fields.codigo_hint: Lowercase letters, digits and underscore only. Must start with a letter. Cannot be changed afterwards.
fields.descripcion_hint: Shown on the landing and in the customer's panel.
fields.descripcion_placeholder: Perfect for small clinics that are just getting started…
fields.color_hex_hint: Plan's primary color on the landing page.
fields.precio_anual_hint: Optional. If empty, only the monthly plan is shown.
fields.trial_days_hint: How many free days the customer gets before being charged.
fields.orden_hint: Position on the landing page (lower = first).
fields.es_publico_hint: When disabled, the plan is only accessible via direct URL.
fields.activo_hint: When disabled, no new subscriptions are accepted.

features_modal.title: Manage features
features_modal.description: Define the limits and modules this plan includes

descriptions.max_productos: Maximum number of products in inventory.
descriptions.factura_electronica: Allows the clinic to turn on SUNAT electronic receipt/invoice issuance (also requires enabling it under Settings → General).
descriptions.notas_credito: Enables credit and debit notes issuance.
descriptions.reportes_avanzados: Access to advanced financial and operational reports.

delete.title: Delete plan
delete.description: You're about to delete the {{name}} plan. This action is final.
delete.has_subscriptions_one: This plan has 1 attached subscription. Deactivate it instead.
delete.has_subscriptions_other: This plan has {{count}} attached subscriptions. Deactivate it instead.
delete.has_subscriptions: This plan has {{count}} attached subscription(s). Deactivate it instead.

bulk.delete_description_one: 1 plan will be deleted. Plans with attached subscriptions are skipped automatically.
bulk.delete_description_other: {{count}} plans will be deleted. Plans with attached subscriptions are skipped automatically.
bulk.delete_description: {{count}} plans will be deleted. Plans with subscriptions are skipped automatically.

empty.no_records_description: Create the first plan so it appears on the landing and customers can subscribe.
empty.no_results_description: Adjust filters or search to see more plans.

toast.load_error: We couldn't load the plans. Retry in a few seconds.
